title: Kaleidoscope
description: A vanilla+ mod that adds an assortment of new quality-of-life items and enhancements to the base game.
body:
![Kaleidoscope banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/784f21f3bd1ca1ea85be41ab18a3cc8f81396fe1.png)

**Kaleidoscope** is a content mod full of miscellaneous features for Fabric! This mod focuses on expanding upon the vanilla game in a way that doesn't heavily alter gameplay.

## Features
> For an in-depth feature list, please look at [the Kaleidoscope Wiki](https://github.com/Chikorita-Lover/Kaleidoscope/wiki)!
- Smelt glass, clay, and wood faster in a kiln - whatever doesn't go in a smoker or blast furnace goes in a kiln!
  - Kilning recipes are dynamically generated, allowing full compatibility with other mods
- Construct fireworks faster with the intuitive fireworks table!
  - Alongside this new utility block are firework shells, items that serve as templates for different firework shapes
- New building blocks such as polished calcite, brick mosaics, and smooth copper
- Craft stick bales and blocks of charcoal for the best compacting of resources
- New stairs, slabs, and walls for many of your favorite blocks
- Stick a banner on the back of your boat, or craft a new one from Nether wood
- Craft some fine doors and trapdoors from glass - and maybe even dye them!
- Jam out to the sweet tunes of a minecart with a jukebox
- Meet the glassblower and fireworker, two new villager professions with unique trades!
- Use your trusty shears to remove saddles from pigs and striders or safely take down a painting for later
  - If you're willing enough, you may even wish to craft shears from netherite ingots...
- Stack more items like snowballs, eggs, banner patterns, and music discs
- Know your foods better with new food and saturation tooltips
- Use a hoe to scrape moss off of mossy stone, or use a shovel to scoop mud from mangrove roots

... and much more!
